overall.description: A video game scene following a large bird of prey as it soars over expansive natural landscapes, transforming from a normal eagle into a skeletal undead form while flying from temperate grasslands into arid desert badlands, eventually joined by a companion bird.

scene_state.functional_zone: temperate grassland with scattered lakes and rolling hills

agents.ego_description: large bird of prey with dark feathers soaring steadily over the green and brown landscape, wings outstretched in a glide

entered.detail: hazy blue mountain silhouette spanning the horizon
large body of water reflecting the morning sunlight
undulating terrain with mixed green grass and brown earth
clusters of trees dotting the hillsides

segments.scene_description: The camera follows a majestic bird of prey flying over a vast temperate landscape. Rolling grasslands stretch below with a large lake visible to the left, while distant mountains line the horizon under a bright morning sun.

scene_state.functional_zone: arid desert badlands with red rock formations and canyons

events.description: the bird undergoes a supernatural transformation, its feathers and flesh dissolving to reveal a skeletal undead form with bony wings

agents.ego_description: skeletal undead bird gliding over the arid terrain, maintaining steady flight with tattered wing membranes

entered.detail: steep reddish-brown rock walls and canyon formations
arid terrain with sparse scrub and erosion features
sandy riverbed cutting through the desert floor

segments.scene_description: As the bird transforms into a skeletal form, the landscape below shifts to arid desert badlands with red rock canyons and sparse vegetation. The camera continues following the undead bird as it soars over the rugged terrain, with mountains now visible to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert canyon expanse with distant mountain backdrop

events.description: a second skeletal bird suddenly appears, joining the first in a loose flight formation

agents.ego_description: leading skeletal bird adjusting flight path slightly to accommodate the companion bird alongside

notable_agents.action: second skeletal bird flying in formation alongside and slightly behind the ego bird, matching its glide pattern

entered.detail: deep canyon cutting through the desert plateau with steep walls

segments.scene_description: A companion skeletal bird joins the flight, and the two soar together over the vast desert canyon. The terrain below features deep erosion channels and rocky outcrops, while the distant mountains remain visible on the right horizon.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a majestic bird of prey transforms into an undead creature while soaring from lush temperate grasslands into an arid desert wasteland. It begins by tracking the bird over rolling green plains and a large lake under a bright morning sun, with distant mountains lining the horizon. As the bird shifts into a skeletal form, the landscape below seamlessly transitions into red rock canyons and sparse vegetation, with the mountains shifting toward the right of the frame. The scene then expands over rugged badlands and deep erosion channels as a companion skeletal bird joins the flight. Finally, the two undead creatures soar together across the vast desert canyon toward the distant rocky horizon.
